title: DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS COUNTY SOCIAL SERVICES DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides case management and helps access available services and resources to eligible individuals who experience Intellectual and/or Developmental Disabilities. Service coordinators connect individuals to services which may include in-home support, residential services, supported living, employment, alternatives to employment, transportation, protective services, and other community resources and benefits. 2051 Kaen Road #135 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Children and adults with an Intellectual and/or Developmental Disabilities who meet the eligibility criteria. Applicants must be an Oregon resident. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-6pm Email (503) 557-2824 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 557-2824 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete the eligibility online referral form Call or email for assistance with applying or for more information An Eligibility Specialist will complete an intake interview and assist applicants through the eligibility review process FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Developmental Disabilities application Proof of address Records of any/all psychological and medical assessments related to the disability LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 7am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the intersection of Kaen and Beavercreek Roads, at the top of the hill in Oregon City. On TriMet Bus Line 33 with sign: Clackamas Community College/CCC Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Disabilities Issues Case/Care Management * Disabilities Issues Certificates/Forms Assistance * Disabilities Issues Disability Related Center Based Employment Disability Related Parenting Programs Disability Related Transportation Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADMINISTRATION COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE–MEDICAID INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SENIOR COMPANION PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM AND RELATIVES AS PARENTS TRANSPORTATION - TRANSPORTATION REACHING PEOPLE UTILITIES - UTILITY SUPPORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS COUNTY SOCIAL SERVICES
